name: CanAlaska Uranium Ltd.
content: CanAlaska Uranium is a Canadian "project generator" and active explorer holding one of the largest land positions in the Athabasca Basin, Saskatchewan—the world's premier district for high-grade uranium. The company manages a diverse portfolio of uranium, nickel, and diamond projects. By partnering with major mining companies to fund exploration, CanAlaska reduces financial risk while maintaining significant upside in multiple Tier-1 targets, including the high-grade Pike Zone discovery at its West McArthur project.
